property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: commonUserCannotListAnotherUserOrders
testcase.system-out:
21:46:03.347 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.service.gabriel.orders.OrdersApplicationTests]: OrdersApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 21:46:03.568 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.service.gabriel.orders.OrdersApplication for test class com.service.gabriel.orders.OrdersApplicationTests 21:46:03.723 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.service.gabriel.orders.OrdersApplicationTests]: OrdersApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 21:46:03.725 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.service.gabriel.orders.OrdersApplication for test class com.service.gabriel.orders.OrdersApplicationTests 21:46:03.847 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running
